title: ‘DreamQuil’ Review: Elizabeth Banks and John C. Reilly in a Visually Adventurous Slice of Dystopia That Feels Like Yesterday’s News
summary: First-time feature director Alex Prager conjures a nightmare future world where a cutting-edge wellness treatment promises women a new lease on life.

title: Peloton is launching bikes and treadmills for gyms, accelerating commercial strategy
summary: Peloton is launching commercial gym-ready Bikes and Treads, expanding into gyms globally as it seeks new growth beyond its at-home fitness business.
